proposal1.heroHeadline: Clearviewagency is losing over 100 hours a year on manual proposal writing. Here's the breakdown.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, proposals are manual and slow. With our system, generate them in just 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below are specific ways Clearviewagency is bleeding resources without this system.

problems.title: Time Draining
problems.description: Each proposal takes an average of 3 hours to craft manually. That's 150 hours a year not spent finding Mansfield, Ohio homes.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual efforts lead to inconsistent branding. This inconsistency costs potential clients' confidence and trust, impacting your bottom line.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Every delay in proposal delivery risks losing a deal. A single lost client could mean $10,000 in lost revenue.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying staff to write proposals manually costs approximately $8,000 annually. This is money that could be reinvested into marketing or client acquisition.

problems.title: Stress and Burnout
problems.description: Repetitive proposal writing leads to employee burnout, reducing productivity. This results in a 20% decrease in effective working hours.

problems.title: Reduced Focus on Clients
problems.description: Every hour on proposals is an hour not spent nurturing client relationships. This lack of focus could lead to a 15% drop in client retention.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system transforms the entire proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to write. Our system produces them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual branding varies with each proposal. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with your brand.

solutions.title: Automated Client Insights
solutions.description: Without data, proposals lack personalization. Our system analyzes client websites for tailored insights.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Proposal writing labor costs are high. Our system cuts those costs by over 50%.

solutions.title: Enhanced Focus
solutions.description: Time spent on proposals detracts from client care. Our system frees up time for valuable client interactions.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Clearviewagency's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Clearviewagency around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Clearviewagency.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Unleash Acme Corp's Potential with Clearviewagency's Winning Strategies.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Together, we'll transform your digital presence into a powerhouse that captures and converts. Let's get the world talking about Acme Corp.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every missed opportunity is a potential customer slipping through the cracks.

problems.title: Low Website Traffic
problems.description: Acme Corp is losing visibility in the crowded online marketplace. With traffic numbers down 30% from last year, your brand's reach is decreasing rapidly.

problems.title: High Bounce Rate
problems.description: Visitors leave too quickly. A 60% bounce rate means more than half of potential customers aren't engaging with your content, leading to revenue loss.

problems.title: Poor Conversion Rates
problems.description: Current conversion rates are at a mere 1.5%. This is below the industry average, translating into significant revenue walking away.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Without a cohesive brand story, Acme Corp's identity gets lost. This inconsistency results in a 25% drop in brand recall among potential clients.

problems.title: Outdated SEO Strategy
problems.description: You're not ranking for critical keywords. Missing out on 40% of potential organic traffic due to outdated SEO practices.

problems.title: Ineffective Social Media
problems.description: Engagement on social platforms is below 2%, far from the industry benchmark. This means missing out on countless interactions with potential customers.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Let's turn these losses into wins with our tailored solutions.

solutions.title: Web Development
solutions.description: Revamp your website to increase traffic and engagement. Our development team will ensure a seamless and appealing user experience.

solutions.title: SEO Optimization
solutions.description: Enhance your search visibility by updating your SEO strategies. We'll get you ranking higher and seen by the right audience.

solutions.title: Branding Services
solutions.description: Craft a consistent and compelling brand story. Our team will ensure Acme Corp stands out and resonates with your audience.

solutions.title: Social Media Management
solutions.description: Boost your presence on social platforms. We will increase engagement and turn followers into loyal customers.
